sentences.en: I like it when you talk to me like that.
You have to learn from your mistakes.
You have to trust yourself.
He said he'd be late again.
Tell your brother to come.
Why do you say it's no good?
You didn't tell me you were coming today.
Do you know if she knows Pablo?
Can you bring me the menu, please?
For me, a coffee with milk.
Nobody's home, that's weird.
Tell the driver to turn here.
You're taller than me.
This one is more expensive than that one.
I think it was a good idea.

sentences.t: 예전엔 많이 공부했는데 이제 덜 해요.
sentences.en: I used to study a lot, now I study less.
sentences.r: yejeonen mani gongbuhaenneunde ije deol haeyo.

sentences.t: 어제 일을 너무 많이 한 것 같아요.
sentences.en: I think I did too many things yesterday.
sentences.r: eoje ireul neomu mani han geot gatayo.

sentences.t: 좀 더 천천히 다시 말해 줄 수 있어요?
sentences.en: Can you say it again more slowly, please?
sentences.r: jom deo cheoncheonhi dasi malhae jul su isseoyo?

sentences.t: 그 사람 울 때 뭐라고 해야 할지 모르겠어요.
sentences.en: I don't know what to say to her when she cries.
sentences.r: geu saram ul ttae mworago haeya halji moreugesseoyo.

sentences.en: I saw your message but I didn't reply.

sentences.t: 뭔가 마음에 들면 더 갖고 싶어요.
sentences.en: When I like something, I want more.
sentences.r: mwonga maeume deulmyeon deo gatgo sipeoyo.

sentences.t: 저는 여기 출신인데 그 사람은 아니에요.
sentences.en: I'm from here, but she isn't.
sentences.r: jeoneun yeogi chulsininde geu sarameun aniyeyo.

sentences.en: I don't know how, but I know her.
She's from here, like me.
I eat at home because I work here.
I have to sleep, I'm really tired.
When it's cold, I don't want to go out.
When I'm tired, I'm not happy.
I act like nothing's wrong.
I want to go with you, but I'm tired.

sentences.t: 마르코는 항상 늦게 오지만 오긴 와요.
sentences.en: Marco always shows up late, but he shows up.
sentences.r: raenggwineun hangsang neutge ojiman ogin wayo.

sentences.en: No, only you have to come.
I'm in a hurry because I have to work.

sentences.t: 잠을 많이 못 자면 일이 잘 안 돼요.
sentences.en: If I don't sleep much, I don't work well.
sentences.r: jameul mani mot jamyeon iri jal an dwaeyo.

sentences.en: If it costs a lot, I won't buy it.
When I'm free, I'm happier.
If you want, we can go together tomorrow.

sentences.t: 네, 근데 한 시간 뒤에 떠나요.
sentences.en: Yes, but it leaves in an hour.
sentences.r: ne, geunde han sigan dwie tteonayo.

sentences.en: If you're tired, rest a bit.
If you can't come today, come tomorrow.

sentences.t: 이해 안 되면 겁내지 말고 물어봐요.
sentences.en: If you don't get it, ask without fear.
sentences.r: ihae an doemyeon geomnaeji malgo mureobwayo.

sentences.en: I'm lost, but I don't want to ask.

sentences.t: 다 가진 건 아니지만 충분히 있어요.
sentences.en: I don't have everything, but I have enough.
sentences.r: da gajin geon anijiman chungbunhi isseoyo.

sentences.en: I have to admit you're right.
You have to watch what you eat.
When I was young, I didn't have money.
If I were you, I wouldn't do it.
I should call her, but I always forget.

sentences.t: 그 사람 볼 때마다 웃음이 나요.
sentences.en: Every time I look at her, I smile.
sentences.r: geu saram bol ttaemada useumi nayo.

sentences.en: I can't sing, but I sing anyway.
Why don't you like coffee?
I really like the food here.
You're you and I'm me.
Yesterday I did a lot and today I'm tired.
This guy here is my friend Carlos.
After work I'm going to your place.
The dog's under the bed.
There's a dog under the bed.
My brother is busy with work.
The keys are always under something.
My keys aren't on the table.
My name is Ana and I'm from Mexico.
The cat's under the table.
I like tea more.
Turn right and it's right there.
Go right and keep straight.
What's your name and where are you from?

sentences.t: 이거 스페인어로 어떻게 말하는지 알려 줘요.
sentences.en: Tell me how you say this in Spanish.
sentences.r: igeo seupeineoro eotteoke malhaneunji allyeo jwoyo.

sentences.en: She's next to the window.
I work every day except Sunday.
I'm going out for a little walk.

sentences.t: 책 읽을 시간이 더 있으면 좋겠어요.
sentences.en: I'd like to have more time to read.
sentences.r: chaek ilgeul sigani deo isseumyeon jokesseoyo.

sentences.en: I'll pay you back everything next week.
She asked me what I meant by that.
I'm looking for a word and I can't find it.

sentences.t: 엄마한테 좋은 거 하나 사 주고 싶어요.
sentences.en: I want to buy something nice for my mom.
sentences.r: eommahante joeun geo hana sa jugo sipeoyo.

sentences.t: 이 아파트에 산 지 이 년 됐어요.
sentences.en: I've been living in this apartment for two years.
sentences.r: i apateue san ji i nyeon dwaesseoyo.

sentences.en: I'm tired and my back hurts.
I have a cough and my throat hurts.
My friends like music.
People like to feel good.

sentences.t: 제가 어디 있는지 아무한테도 말하지 마요.
sentences.en: Don't tell anyone where I am.
sentences.r: jega eodi inneunji amuhantedo malhaji mayo.

sentences.en: I'll give you my opinion: don't do it.
I found an easier way to do it.
I always study a bit before going to bed.

sentences.t: 너무 많이 시켜서 이제 더 못 먹겠어요.
sentences.en: I ordered too much and now I can't eat anymore.
sentences.r: neomu mani sikyeoseo ije deo mot meokgesseoyo.

sentences.en: The remote's next to the couch.
The phone's ringing in my room.
I have a doctor's appointment on Tuesday.
I don't see the exit anywhere.
They showed everyone the photos from the trip.

sentences.t: 이거 어제 샀는데 벌써 고장 났어요.
sentences.en: I bought this yesterday and it's already broken.
sentences.r: igeo eoje sanneunde beolsseo gojang nasseoyo.

sentences.en: Yesterday I went to the supermarket and bought a lot.
